title: The Battlefield Goes Silent
description: On pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this part focuses on alabasta learns the truth. The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
scene: This scene belongs to the Alabasta Learns the Truth sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Preparing to light the fuuussseeeeeeeee! Ohohoho!

summary: The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
